notes: Single-batch analysis (batch-1.json): 42 nodes / 63 edges in, 42 / 63 out. No nodes or edges dropped, so the merge had no 'could not fix' items to action.
All 20 .py source files plus __init__.py and .understand-anything/.understandignore are represented as file nodes (21 total); __init__.py and .understandignore correctly have no function children.
All node types are valid (file, function) and all complexity values are valid (simple, complex). No unknown types or complexity values, and no nodes missing an id field.
Zero dangling edges; every edge source/target resolves to an existing node.

Strategy lineage via 'related' edges is sensibly captured and consistent with project history: main_v1->v2->v3->v4 iteration chain; main_v3_pure branches from both main_v3 and main_v2 (matches the 'v2 engine + only the Buddy Blast fix' design); Crustle/Typhlosion family (main_typhlosion->main_typh_base->main_crustle_base->main.py); Honchkrow lineage (honchkrow->main_honch_base->main_v1); fire->{main_crustle_base, bare_agent}; main_megalucario_backup and main_bench->main.py as legacy/variant.
No imports edges expected or added: per the dispatch, all 21 pilots import only from the external cg.api package, so absence of intra-folder import edges is correct.
Fixed section sanity: not separately reported by the merge run (output equalled input), so no systemic ID-correction or complexity-skew concerns to flag.
